Documentation for building, flashing, and interacting with Pebble Recovery Firmware (PRF).

# Purpose
PRF (Pebble Recovery Firmware) is a firmware image designed for recovery purposes, allowing a phone to connect and flash a new firmware image if the main firmware is broken or unavailable. To build the PRF image, execute the command `./waf build_prf` after configuring the project. The PRF image can be flashed directly into the application area using `./waf flash_prf`, which is beneficial for developing PRF features as it enables the watch to boot directly to PRF. For regular use, flash the PRF image to the external flash with `./waf image_recovery`, and use the `--tty` option if necessary. To run PRF from the main flash, press the specified button combinations during booting. Interaction with the PRF console is possible by executing `./waf console_prf`.
